steps.title: Use the current-time signal
steps.content: Currently tells us the sentence is describing the frog's range as it exists now. The verb must be simple present to match that present-time meaning.

steps.title: Pick the present-tense verb
steps.content: The matching verb is simple present and agrees with the singular subject range. Choice A is past perfect, Choice B is future perfect, and Choice D is simple past, so each conflicts with Currently. The answer is C.
